title: 函館スプリントSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: This is the first trial of our training.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. I'm plenty cute today. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know I'll learn something at this race. I can just
feel it!
